_comment: FULL Mutation Profile — comprehensive run for main branch, nightly, or manual trigger.
NOT intended for regular PR CI (use stryker.fast.config.json for that).
Reason: typescriptChecker runs tsc against all project files, including apps/web/ (JSX/TSX).
This fails with 'Cannot use JSX unless the --jsx flag is provided' errors.
Type safety is already enforced by the separate `npm run typecheck` CI gate.
Risk: Mutants that produce invalid TypeScript (not caught by typecheck gate) may survive.
Mitigation: fast mutation profile gates critical code; full profile uses incremental thresholds.
